title: assignment to a packed array variable formed from a concatenation

features.name: packed struct definition with logic fields
features.description: Code should include a packed struct with multiple multi-bit logic fields used as a hardware register type
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic [15:0] ESR; logic [15:0] LS; logic [15:0] LE; logic [15:0] OR0; logic [15:0] OR1; } regs_struct;

features.name: packed struct as module output port
features.description: Code should include a packed struct used as an output port of a module

features.name: struct member assignment from concatenation
features.description: Code should include an assignment to a struct member where the RHS is a concatenation of signal slices forming the full width
features.snippet: wire [15:0] ESR_int; wire [6:0] ESP; assign regs.ESR = {ESR_int[15:7], ESP};

features.name: workaround using intermediate wire for struct assignment
features.description: Code should include a workaround pattern where partial assignments build up an intermediate wire before assigning to a struct member
features.snippet: wire [15:0] ESR_collected; assign ESR_collected[15:7] = ESR_int[15:7]; assign ESR_collected[6:0] = ESP; assign regs.ESR = ESR_collected;
